children: Likely a reference to American rapper, singer, & songwriter, “Russ”

29681243.fragment: Bitch said I look like Russ and took her clothes off

children: Pouya is making a comparison to Coleslaw, which is side dish consisting primarily of finely shredded raw cabbage with a salad dressing or condiment.
It’s considered gross by a majority of people. Therefore, it usually goes untouched at parties or on any dinner plate.

29681229.fragment: I don’t get touched, bitch, I’m coleslaw

children: An interesting sample, this portion of the song is taken from comedian Rodney Norman.
The audio is extracted from a TikTok that Norman posted around 2022.
